Di saat-saat terakhir, Nadira meminta putranya, Rafi mengungkap rahasia keluarga yang selama ini tersembunyi.

items.title: Dendam Cintaku
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Zoe akhirnya bebas setelah suaminya mati, tapi nggak disangka dia kembali ke masa sebelum pernikahan politik mereka. Dipaksa sistem mengubah takdir suami, dia justru bertemu Pino yang juga bereinkarnasi penuh dendam. Dari musuh jadi pasangan, mereka bersama ungkapkan konspirasi istana.

items.title: Pengampunan Cinta
items.author: akewenhua
items.abstract: Dipaksa menikah dengan CEO Arief, Ayu mengalami kehidupan pernikahan yang dingin dan penuh cobaan. Terlibat dalam penyelidikan kematian, Ayu berhasil mendapat petunjuk dan memperbaiki salah paham dengan Arief.

items.title: Cinta Tak Sengaja di Usia Senja
items.author: baichuanzhongwen
items.abstract: Ratna Wulandari, di usia empat puluh, menikah dengan Aditya Pratama demi memenuhi desakan putrinya. Setelah setahun terpisah, Ratna menjadi asisten pribadi Aditya tanpa menyadari bahwa bosnya adalah suaminya. Kesalahpahaman dan identitas tersembunyi membuat hubungan mereka penuh kejutan, hingga akhirnya kebenaran terungkap.

items.title: Cinta Kedua yang Tumbuh
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Setelah kembali dari luar negeri, Putri bertemu lagi dengan Rangga. Dulu mereka berpisah karena kesalahpahaman dan tekanan hidup. Kini, Rangga mendukung Putri menghadapi tantangan karier dan keluarga. Bersama, mereka mengungkap kebenaran masa lalu, saling jujur, dan akhirnya bersatu.

items.title: Cinta Baru Denganmu
items.author: tianqiao
items.abstract: Setelah sepuluh tahun bersama, pernikahan Putri dan Guntur hancur karena perselingkuhan Guntur. Setiap kali hatinya terluka, Putri membakar surat cinta lama hingga semuanya habis. Saat Guntur menyesal, Putri telah menikah dengan kakak angkatnya dan memulai hidup baru di luar negeri.

items.title: Takdir Cinta Tersembunyi
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Tanpa sengaja bermalam bersama, Nadia Prameswari menampung Rizky Pratama yang menyembunyikan identitas aslinya. Rizky diam-diam menjadi pelindung terkuat Nadia di masa sulit. Ketika hubungan makin dekat, insiden tak terduga mengungkap jati diri Rizky yang sebenarnya, mengubah awal yang keliru menjadi cinta sejati.

items.title: Dari Luka ke Cinta
items.author: guoerchuanmei
items.abstract: Jelang tunangan, Linda Lim kabur dari keluarga dan tunangan br*ngsek, lalu hamil anak Charlie Furr, pewaris Hiana. Charlie beli Hotel Shangri-La demi mendekatinya. Meski ingin mandiri, Linda akhirnya luluh dan jadi wanita paling dicintai pewaris Grup Furr.

items.title: Cinta Baru di Rumah Kost
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Setelah putus dari Aditya Wijaya, Putri Ayu jadi partner sewa rumah bersama Raka Pratama. Cinta perlahan tumbuh seiring kesalahpamanan antara keduanya. Di saat Aditya ingin membuat Putri cemburu, Putri justru sudah melupakan Aditya dan mulai jatuh hati pada Raka.

items.title: Married to My Professor
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: One night. One mistake. Mia never expected to wake up next to her cold, by-the-book university professor, let alone end up pregnant. Just when she's on the verge of breaking down, Professor Carter stuns her with a proposal. Next thing she knows, they're living under one roof as husband and wife.

items.title: In Other Words, I Love You
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: When Alice scores a scholarship to London’s elite Ashford Institute, she clashes with the school’s royal pain, Charles "King" Kenward. But one wild twist lands them under the same roof… and their rivalry? About to turn dangerously romantic.

items.title: Proud to Be Your Mom
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Evelyn Shaw transmigrated into a heartless mother's body and decides to correct the mistakes the mother made. Evelyn uses magical resources to make money to take back Emily and Lucas, the children whom the mother sold, and make chili-based products, bringing the happy family big success.

items.title: Kiss Me before You Bite
items.author: xianwenwu
items.abstract: When a zombie outbreak hits, Tia Gale is locked outside to die until the zombie king finds her first. But instead of killing her, he claims her. As fear turns into something far more dangerous, a strange bond forms between prey and predator.

items.title: The Rose Hidden in Midsummer
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Rose Shannon transfers to Atlante No. 6 High School, where she meets Andrew Spencer, a "troublemaker". As Rose helps Andrew get over his past, they fall in love. They made a promise to get into the same university. But what Andrew doesn't know is that his countdown to the SAT is also her countdown—to the end of her life.

items.title: Read the Devil's Heart
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: When her father falls ill, tea artist Emily Young is forced to marry Alexander Grant, the capital's feared "King of Hell." But Emily discovers she can read his mind and sees the tenderness behind his cold facade. As Alexander destroys anyone who hurts her, their fake marriage turns into obsessive love.

items.title: Taming the Tyrant
items.author: guangzhiying
items.abstract: Trapped inside a novel as a fake princess, Katharine has only three days to live. Her only way out is to charm the tyrant who wants her dead. But to save her life, she must first heal his heart. As their battles grow more intense, the two begin to grow closer.

items.title: I Found My Baby's Dad
items.author: yidiandianranyingshi
items.abstract: After losing her firefighter husband Ryan Carter and discovering she's pregnant, Emily Lane is devastated. Sorting his belongings, she finds his secret 2007 crush. Suddenly, she and her unborn child are sent back to the year they first met, into the world of the "White-haired Youth," determined to rewrite their fate.

items.title: Secrets Behind the Vows
items.author: caiyuangungun
items.abstract: Kate, a jewelry saleswoman, is pressured into marriage by her family. With no way out, she calls Mike, a man she met earlier, and proposes a marriage of convenience. He agrees. She thinks it's strictly business, but he is secretly a billionaire heir. As the truth comes out, he wins her over, and they fall in love for real.

items.title: I Woke Up as a Mom
items.author: shuxiadeyezi
items.abstract: A college girl jumps twenty years into the future and becomes a mom. Her dream marriage turns bitter after her husband's betrayal. She chooses divorce, fights for her son, mends old friendships, and builds a new life on her own terms.

items.title: From Fat to Fabulous
items.author: huahuayedu
items.abstract: Framed and mocked for her weight, Kayla vanishes for a year, shedding the weight to return as an absolute goddess. A blind date leads to a whirlwind marriage with Jace, the cold heir everyone fears. Everyone expects her to fail, but they fall for each other. Some things are just meant to be.

items.title: Spoiled by the Villains
items.author: yuewen
items.abstract: Lexi, a modern-day girl, wakes up as a doomed stepsister in a novel. To survive, she saves her family and builds a street food empire from scratch. But her real blessing? Two cold-hearted villains become her fiercest protectors. They were meant to hate her. Instead, they spoil her like she's the only treasure in their world!

items.title: Make-up Sex
items.author: Dreameshort
items.abstract: "The heir of the Wright family, whose sexual function was impaired in a car accident, was giving up. Then he ran into Lily, his teenage crush and a rehab therapist. Through her kindness and expertise, he regained both inner strength and physical health, and reclaimed his lost love."

items.title: Seven Nights With My Ex
items.author: Jiuzhou
items.abstract: Six years ago, Olivia was framed for infidelity and divorced by Liam. Six years later, fate brings them back together. Olivia thinks they can finally clear the air. But Liam shatters her hopes, handing her a cold seven-night contract to be his mistress. Seven night ends, they should part for good—yet Liam shreds the contract, determined to keep her forever. “Liam, do you still have any feeling for me? ” “Yes, but only hatred.” Why did they once so deeply in love end up this way? Was the "infidelity" from years ago a setup, hiding darker secrets? As the truth emerges, perhaps this was all a carefully crafted trap...

items.title: Spoiled By the Icy Billionaire
items.author: ShortMax
items.abstract: Betrayed by her stepsister and fiancé, a young heiress is drugged and wakes up in bed with a stranger. Disgraced and disinherited, she is cast out from her home. However, fate brings her back to the stranger, and she discovers he is her ex-fiancé's wealthy uncle. After a flirtatious encounter, she enters into a whirlwind marriage with him. In the end, she uncovers his ultimate secret—he is not just a tycoon but a world-class billionaire, far more powerful and wealthy than her former fiancé's uncle.

items.title: Falling for You
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Who would have thought that the free-spirited Zoe Sherman would challenge school heartthrob Felix Lutton on day one? Known as the untouchable crush of countless girls, Felix surprisingly doesn’t get angry at Zoe’s bold teasing. Instead, he follows her every word, leaving everyone in shock.

items.title: Grant Me the Starlight
items.author: feiranchengzhang
items.abstract: Jilted and drunk, Lila accidentally married her best friend's uncle, Marcus. Forced into it, he shocks her by becoming fiercely devoted—whipping his own brother to avenge her and dropping old grudges to protect her future. When a long-set trap throws them into chaos, they realize they've become each other's saving light.

items.title: Twisted Contract
items.author: douduyanqing
items.abstract: To save her ill friend Aaron, Melissa signs a contract with icy tycoon Richard, pretending to be his lover to sabotage his engagement. Planning to cash out, she is unexpectedly showered with affection. Discovering Aaron's betrayal, she turns the tables, sparking Richard's passionate pursuit in a tale of love.

items.title: Her Revenge Game
items.author: hanxiangyanqing
items.abstract: After finishing her last mission, Athena enters a new story to avenge her friend. She becomes a small-town girl forced to marry a scarred billionaire heir. Everyone buys her innocent act. Then she wins his heart, takes his empire, and hunts her friend's killer. They think she's just a trophy wife, but she's actually a warrior.

items.title: Fall into His Trap
items.author: wuli
items.abstract: Sold to a powerful creditor, Luna thinks she's the victim of a setup. But Yale Jaden is already one step ahead. Playing innocent, he turns the trap around—until the bright, stubborn girl walks straight into a marriage he planned all along.

items.title: Lust in the Shadows
items.author: tianqiao
items.abstract: Sophia marries honest-looking David, only to face constant betrayal. She plans revenge. Charles discovers it, and they begin a secret passionate affair. Cold outside, intimate privately. Sophia expects a fleeting fling, but Charles grows deeply attached.

items.title: Fate in the Night
items.author: daoyanbeifeng
items.abstract: After a kidnapping brings Chloe and Alex Carter together, they slowly fall for each other. Alex's ex, Anna, pursues wealth with John Thompson but is left disappointed. When Anna tries to return, Alex refuses, and Chloe and Alex ultimately find happiness together.

items.title: Run Wild in His Heart
items.author: xinyu
items.abstract: Before Mr. Lloid passed away, he demanded that Jane have a baby to inherit the family fortune. So she approached the young heir who turned out to be the renowned rich man Simon. He became insatiable, spending every moment with her and even taking medication to treat infertility. But if he was infertile, whose baby she was having?

items.title: Dangerous Sister Love
items.author: zhangbangduanju
items.abstract: Emily Sutton is told to corrupt her brother Nathan's worldview, and her cold look hides her gentle heart. She manipulates Nathan for her task, and he secretly loves her and is ready to give up all. When Emily plans to leave, Nathan fights back and shows his deep passion and loyalty to her.

items.title: The Time Limit for Love
items.author: wuli
items.abstract: Claire had a crush on Alexander for 8 years. Accidentally, she sold her first time to him. Alexander believed she was a secret lover who was unfit to be seen by the public. When the agreed time approached, she left him decisively. Alexander thought he had lost her forever and found himself to be deeply in love with her.

items.title: Kiss Me Under the Vine
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: A virgin violinist fled her abusive landlord and stumbled into a mansion, where she met her first love—assuming he was just a charming gardener. She plunged into a whirlwind romance, only to learn he was the heir to a powerful winery empire.

items.title: Accidentally in Love
items.author: tianjinchangjiaolu
items.abstract: Dylan, a powerful heir, and Bella, a mortician, start a casual fling after a chance meeting. Misunderstandings and pride tear them apart. Dylan only realizes he's truly in love after she walks away. To win her back, he swallows his pride, and together they choose each other for life.

items.title: Love Through the False Front
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After a decade-long love ends, Jessica London had a spontaneous one-night stand with Jacob Cheney. What begins as a rebound fling soon makes them face their emotional barriers. Jacob refuses to quit and tries to break through Jessica's defenses. Eventually, the two rebuild their love beyond pretense.

items.title: Freely Falling for You
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After a chance encounter, Jo Jordan—a solitary orphan—finds herself in a sudden marriage to Royalton City's most powerful man, Arthur Quinn, while carrying his child. What starts as a cold, transactional arrangement quickly turns into a passionate romance, as Arthur's unexpected devotion changes both their lives forever.

items.title: My Tough Guy Boyfriend Is CEO
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Roundie Scott and Leonard Chase navigate through misunderstandings and conflicts, gradually getting to know each other better. As they overcome these challenges, their bond strengthens, and they eventually come together as a couple.

items.title: Drunk on You
items.author: feiranchengzhang
items.abstract: After getting drunk, Aria accidentally slept with her best friend’s brother, whom she secretly liked. They married hastily. She thought it wouldn’t last long, but after the marriage, Julian doted on her—turned out that accident was his plan. Actually, Julian had secretly loved her all along…

items.title: Married to My One-night Stand
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Due to a setup, Serena had a one-night stand with Victor without knowing his identity and got pregnant. Arranged to marry Grandfather Hawthorne, she was shocked to realize that the groom was Master Victor at the wedding. Faced with many difficulties, Serena turned the table, crushed her scum relatives, and found her real family.

items.title: The Long-Planned Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: A ruthless landlord leaves Celia homeless—until she runs into Leon, her icy ex-instructor from years ago. Desperate for a place to stay, she agrees to his sudden marriage offer. What starts as a deal soon reveals Leon’s secret: he’s been waiting for her all along.

items.title: Unplanned Love
items.author: jingyue
items.abstract: Ria takes over her mom's night shift at a hotel. There, she runs into Tyler, who's been set up. The two have a wild night together... Ria thinks it was just a one-night stand, but soon finds out that the job she applied for is actually to be Tyler's assistant. As they start working together, Tyler begins to fall for Ria. Just then, Tyler's so-called girlfriend Renee discovers their relationship... The love triangle is an eternal theme, and it seems all relationships are headed in this direction.

items.title: Hotel Romance
items.author: guoerchuanmei
items.abstract: On the eve of her engagement, Emily Lane leaves her cheating fiancé and toxic family, then gets pregnant with Charles Foster's child. When Charles buys the resort, Emily works hard to prove herself. She slowly falls for him as he pursues her, and she gains her own place and his heart at last.

items.title: Thief of Hearts
items.author: feiranchengzhang
items.abstract: Growing up with the Grays, Selene agreed to marry Ezra, who Ezra didn't want to get married too soon. Selene had accidentally slept with Lance, a friend of Ezra's who had adored her since they were little. Lance and Selene eventually fell in love and were married after a lot of struggles.

items.title: The Marriage Game
items.author: xiaotuanyuanwenhua（tinghuadaozizhanghao）
items.abstract: Jake and Vivian once believe their marriage is just a contract. Yet through clashes and companionship, the secret of unspoken love comes to light. Jake tries to win her heart with sincerity. After learning the truth, Vivian chooses to embrace their marriage. In the end, they choose to stay together.
items.source: 小团圆文化（听花岛子账号）

items.title: His Silent Obsession
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: As the true heiress of the York family, Vivienne returns home yearning for familial warmth, even submitting to her adopted sister Sophie. But when she uncovers their plan to trade her as a pawn in a marriage of convenience, she strikes back with a daring move: marrying Jason Shea, the man whose devotion has lingered for years.

items.title: He Can’t Let Her Go
items.author: feiranchengzhang
items.abstract: Raised by the Rivers Family, Clara Reed returns to marry Charles Rivers. Discovering a new secretary, she impulsively spends a night with Marcus Night, igniting passion and elite rivalry. A fleeting encounter ignites a web of passion and rivalry among Capital City's elite, where love and loyalty twist.

items.title: Love's Perfect Landing
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Ace pilot Isabella Kaur hits career and personal lows when new CEO Javier Morgan arrives, sparking unexpected chemistry. He is smitten with her, and she discovers that he resembles her captain idol. Later, she becomes his copilot, and through flying missions together, their relationship blossomed.

items.title: Thorns of Desire
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After attending a party with her boyfriend Ethan, Claire receives a provocative message from Ryan. She assumes their paths won’t cross again, but Ryan soon infiltrates every aspect of her life. As Claire’s world becomes increasingly entangled with Ryan’s, she realizes she’s been caught in his carefully laid trap.

items.title: Love, Next Door
items.author: xiaotuanyuanwenhua（tinghuadaozizhanghao）
items.abstract: Years ago, Ivy was the older neighbor who tutored Tony. After a rejected confession, they parted ways. Over a decade later, they become neighbors again—she’s a struggling single mother, while he, now successful, hides his identity. Tony claims he only wants to see her fail, but soon realizes she has always been his only sunshine.
items.source: 小团圆文化（听花岛子账号）

items.title: Love at First Bite
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Adopted by werewolf hunters, 18-year-old Staysha's mission to kill her first werewolf changes when she unknowingly spends a night with the charming Alpha King, igniting a forbidden romance.

items.title: Her Unspoken Crush
items.author: xingjijuchang
items.abstract: Three years after high school, Sophie Lane is shocked to see Henry Carter—the boy she secretly loved—back on campus. Now a refined and sought-after returnee, Henry gave up a top overseas offer just to find the girl who once watched him sleep in class. This time, he won't let her slip away again.

items.title: Mistaken Target, Unexpected Love
items.author: feiranchengzhang
items.abstract: Camille Jennings spends five years trying to win over the wrong person to protect her family, only to discover her true target was Lucas Reed, who has secretly loved her all along. As their paths intertwine through the strategy, their feelings deepen, leading to a heartfelt and unexpected romance.

items.title: From Campus Crush to IRL Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Sophie Sullivan had chased Lucas Warren for three years. Then the system told her the real target had been Philip Lawton all along. She turned her sights on Philip; his favor soared so fast she thought it was a glitch. What she never knew was that ten years earlier, he had saved her, and she had been his light ever since.

items.title: Love Entangled in Harbor City
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Syria, facing family bias, quit her job due to her brother's debts. In desperation, she planned to interview Yancey Zenter, heir of Harbor City's most influential family, to save her career. Known for his indifference toward women, Yancey unexpectedly found himself drawn to her, and their encounter sparked a real romance.

items.title: My Billionaire Sugar Baby
items.author: Ottawood Film
items.abstract: She thought he was just a charming sugar baby - until he bought her company, crashed her marriage, and dropped to one knee. Now, with her life flipped upside down, she has to choose between pride, power… and the billionaire who never stopped loving her.

items.title: Captive to His Obsession
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After her death, film star Chloe Grove transmigrates into the body of a novel’s female protagonist. Upon waking, she’s thrust into the villain’s messy divorce and a fate of torture and death. Desperate to survive, Chloe uses every trick in the book to win over the villain’s heart, leading the once paranoid and violent man to possessively keep her by his side.

items.title: Poisoned Hearts
items.author: douduyanqing
items.abstract: Darian has been physically poisoned for a long time and finally met Lila who can interpret him. They gradually fell in love. Due to an accident, Darian mistakenly believed that Lila had lost her life. Years later, when the two met again, Darian could only protect her secretly, longing to fall in love with her once more.

items.title: Devil's Lullaby
items.author: huace
items.abstract: Scarlett, a whimsical girl battling ALS, ignites a dangerous game with Lucien, "The Ice King", to fulfill her late mother's final wish. Armed with surgical precision, Lucien exploits every vulnerability to cage his prey. But as cornered rabbits bite back, the girl's fiery defiance begins melting her captor's glacial heart.

items.title: Must Kiss You
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Wendy Wynn and James Wynn have secretly married for three years, pretending to be rivals at work due to company rules. When James draws female attention and Wendy's ex reveals their secret, jealousy and misunderstandings rise. James wants to reveal their marriage, but Wendy resists, sparking office drama and romance.

items.title: Blazing Claim
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Selena is abandoned by her fiance, Vincent, who skips the engagement party due to an affair. Heartbroken, she enters a whirlwind marriage with Ash, the CEO of every woman’s dreams in the city. When Vincent tries to win her back, Ash shields her. Their marriage turns out to be the culmination of Ash's ten-year secret infatuation.

items.title: One Night with My First Love
items.author: caiyuangungun
items.abstract: Orphaned at ten, Freya grows up in her crush’s house, secretly in love with the Thorns’s heir, Byron, until his mother tears them apart. Five years later, he returns, and a welcome party turns into a one-night stand. When their secret feelings erupt, will they fight for each other or give in again?

items.title: My Secret Crush on You
items.author: feiranchengzhang
items.abstract: When Lily Stone starts her new job, she discovers her supervisor, Dr. Julian Grant, is the senior she secretly admired in high school. Both hide their feelings behind a cool facade, unaware of their mutual affection. As misunderstandings unravel, their long-hidden love finally brings them together.

items.title: My Aloof Guardian Falls for Me
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After Ruthie Marshall was driven out of her adoptive family, Shawn Henson, the subordinate and comrade of her late father, took her in. By a twist of fate, they were drugged and ended up having a wild night without knowing each other's identities. While trying to find out who their one-night stands were, Ruthie was moved by Shawn's protective and caring nature, while Shawn was drawn to Ruthie's quirky charm and strong independence...

items.title: My Game, My Rules
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After realizing she was a minor character, Stella fought her fate. When a blind date tried to take covert photos, she struck back hard. Elders failed to seize her company. Forced into more dates by her mother, she hired a seemingly mild-mannered man who, with teary eyes, became her unwavering shield.

items.title: In Love with Her Forever
items.author: huahuayedu
items.abstract: Sean Shaw, a notorious playboy, and Julia Shay, distant and composed, were worlds apart. After 5 years of silent marriage, she initiated a divorce. Everyone mocked her, but when Shaw was slapped by her, he begged for her back, desperate and jealous.

items.title: Let Me Go, Mr. Ford
items.author: jingyue
items.abstract: Lila loved Ethan until discovering his secret marriage to Sophie. After she left heartbroken, Ethan sought her forgiveness—only to learn she'd died in a crash the night he betrayed her. Reborn, Lila traded her shattered heart for a cold, new life.

items.title: Snowed in Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: To save her family from financial crisis, Shirley reluctantly marries Julian, but on their wedding day, he goes abroad with only a bank card. She then fights alone to reclaim her late mother's legacy, yet when Julian returns, he quietly guards her. Finally, the two wounded souls slowly learn to trust and truly love each other.

items.title: Seduce My Fiance's Uncle
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Yvette Spencer falls in love with Shane Peterson, her fiance's CEO uncle. Shane has been living a celibate life. No matter how she seduces him, he's unmoved. Yvette gets pregnant after an unexpected one-night stand with him. She escapes after learning that he has used her to get revenge on his half-brother Nathan Peterson. It makes Shane realize he can't live without her. Will he be able to find her and get her back?

items.title: Stealing Her Heart
items.author: zikunjuchang
items.abstract: Quentin hides his powerful background and stays by her side as just a friend. Every encounter is carefully arranged. His secret love goes back to a rainy day in their youth. She once shared her leaky umbrella, and he has never forgotten her kindness.

items.title: Redemption's Trap
items.author: hanxiangyanqing
items.abstract: Grace Nolan is called the murderer's daughter and suffers public contempt. She meets Charles Hawthorne, the mysterious uncle of her ex-lover. Charles protects Grace with his past memories. He helps her escape rumors and regain pride. His love turns Grace from an outcast into a respected woman.

items.title: Destined for More
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: The heroine lands in a tragic novel as the beloved figure returning from abroad. To avoid the original character’s fate, she pretends to be married and lives with her supposed fiancé, the main love interest. Initially unimpressed, he becomes enchanted by her. Winning his heart and advancing her career, she changes their destinies. The second love interest regrets losing her, but she finds happiness in love and success in her career.

items.title: Loving My Rival
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: In her past life, Amber Page betrayed Chase Scott, and he eventually died because of her actions. Upon waking up reborn, Amber finds herself plunging into his arms...

items.title: Playing Nice
items.author: feiranchengzhang
items.abstract: Mia Foster leaves her rural hometown and joins wealthy Bell Family with her aunt. She meets reclusive Young Master Bell, fragile and mildly autistic, distant and troubled. An accident ties their fates, Mia's leaving pushes him to act desperately. Adapted from a novel, it shows emotional healing and complex family bonds.

items.title: Loved by Surprise
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Struggling artist Sophie Cotton takes a job at an exclusive club to pay tuition. After drunkenly kissing aloof heir Leon Sterling, she wakes in his villa, bound by a maid contract. Challenging Leon's control, their clash of pride sparks a hilarious, heartfelt romance as he falls for the girl who upended his life.

items.title: Love and Revenge
items.author: haiyuxingkong
items.abstract: As the illegitimate daughter, Jane suffers constant humiliation from her stepmother and half-sister. Seeking revenge, she seduces Andy, the man her sister desires. Though he appears cold, he finds himself unable to resist her, and the two become entangled in a turbulent mix of emotions.

items.title: Never Let You Go Again
items.author: feiranchengzhang
items.abstract: Charlotte Sanders, betrayed by her boyfriend, is sent to Ethan Chamber's bed as a gift. Ethan is known as a cold business tycoon, but somehow he takes Charlotte right in and they just get married. What Charlotte doesn’t know is Ethan has been waiting forever for her.

items.title: From a Lie to Love
items.author: enbishengyingshi
items.abstract: Sharp-tongued Lana jokes on a blind date that she is in love with CEO Erik. He overhears every word. One awkward proposal later, she's married to Erik. Now, the lines are starting to blur. The man who swore he'd never fall is falling hard. She faked it but now he is playing for keeps.

items.title: Love Grows Here
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Autumn Lynn marries the Weston Family in place of her sister and lives with James Weston as strangers. She hides her marriage and works as an intern. James is touched by her strength and supports her. Through difficulties and tests, they grow close and turn their duty marriage into true love.

items.title: Marry My Boyfriend's Little Uncle
items.author: bikan
items.abstract: Yoselin Lee is the biological daughter of the Lee family, while Shea Lee is their adopted daughter, but in reality, she is Yvette Su, the true daughter of the Su family. Yoselin Lee stole Shea Lee's token and pretended to be Yvette Su to enter the Su family, attempting to marry Brock Jiang. However, Brock Jiang fell in love with Shea Lee. Eventually, Yoselin Lee's plot was exposed, and Shea Lee returned to the Su family and got engaged to Brock Jiang.

items.title: Light in the Shadows
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After eight years apart, Olivia and Ryan reunite, discovering their childhood crushes have blossomed into deep love. Olivia once brought light to Ryan's darkest days; now, Ryan uses his vast business empire to help her rise to the top. Overcoming distance and unraveling secrets, they forge an unbreakable, lifelong bond.

items.title: Runaway Bride, Obsessed Husband
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Claire Summers wakes as a doomed villainess in a novel. She saves herself by loving her autistic husband, Evan Sterling, and running his family. Her kindness brings rewards and strong feelings. Evan craves her love deeply. When she leaves with their child, he grows more obsessed and swears to stay with her forever.

items.title: Taming His Love
items.author: feiranchengzhang
items.abstract: To fulfill her grandpa's last wish, Lily, despite being the Evans's proud heiress, plans a quick marriage for herself. Mistaking her target, she ends up entangled with a man who turns out to be her brother's sworn enemy. Now, seeing her as his love, he's not letting her go...Adapted from the Fanqie novel Mr. Dalton's Wild Chase, written by Shiqiqi.

items.title: Beloved by My In‑Laws
items.author: meiguang(guangzhoulinyang)
items.abstract: Jessica transmigrates into a novel, knowing she's only a side character. Married to a genius researcher and quickly divorced, she shamelessly tries to stay, only to win over his family. When love finally blooms, she walks away, because she has always known her place. Now Charles is desperate to win her back.

items.title: Love Sent by Mistake
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Charles Goodwin accidentally sends a love confession to his boss, Serena Quinn, sparking an unexpected romance. From a mistaken message, Charles grows from a carefree heir to a devoted partner, while Serena reveals her softer side. Together, they face work challenges and personal growth, turning a playful act into true love.

items.title: Beneath His Breath
items.author: yinghuokuaichuang
items.abstract: Ronnie, a poisoned rose in a den of vipers, finds herself ensnared by Lucius, the most deranged man. On their reunion night, his fingers dug into her waist like steel talons, and lips curled in a predator's grin, "Honey, do you think you could play with me and flee?" Yet when shadows swallow them whole, he pressed her against the cold wall, and his voice shatters into a plea, "Please love me again."

items.title: Swan and Her Worshipper
items.author: caisiminjiebinggan
items.abstract: At 18, Sophie Reed loses everything and is sent to the isolated town of Willowtown. Glamorous and out of place, she clashes with the small-town world. That winter, she meets Lucas Shaw—a deaf boy hiding behind silence. One unexpected encounter sparks a long-running story of first love, healing, and heartbreak.

items.title: Trap My Dark Moon
items.author: zhangbangduanju
items.abstract: A girl is taken to her birth family for a prophecy, loses her memory in a conflict, and is declared dead, separating her from her first love for eight years. She becomes his contract wife to steal a necklace, he recognizes her, she takes revenge with his help, and they live happily.

items.title: Love Unfiltered
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Emily Brooks enters elite St. John's College and clashes with Alex Kingston at once, while Julian West steps in quietly to form a tangled love triangle. She fights bullying, class gaps, and misunderstandings to find true love and precious self-growth amid tough, hidden challenges all the way.

items.title: Drowning in Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Anna gave up her medical dream to work as a medic, all to stay close to Olympic champion Charles Turing. But for years, he took her love for granted, keeping their relationship in the shadows. An unexpected pregnancy forced Anna to see the truth—she had fallen for a man incapable of love. As Charles finally realizes his true feelings, he must fight to reclaim the love he almost lost.

items.title: Dangerous Embrace
items.author: mizhijuchang
items.abstract: Lily Summers, a fallen heiress, escapes a forced marriage to the controlling Jason Bell and stumbles into the world of underground racer Nick Rivers. As secrets unravel, Lily finds herself drawn to Nick's enigmatic charm, igniting a passionate and perilous romance that defies all expectations.

items.title: Addicted to Her Charm
items.author: guoerchuanmei
items.abstract: Amelia humiliated herself chasing Matthew, becoming the city’s laughingstock—until the truth emerged: he was only a substitute, and she longed to escape. But Matthew, once incapable of love, fell obsessively for her, descending into madness as he bound her to his side, begging for her love.

items.title: My Cold Hubby Wants Me Back
items.author: changdu
items.abstract: Juliet Pierce and Myles Hansen were married for three years, but Myles was rarely home. Their relationship seemed to hinge on a monthly intimacy, a mere ritual in a failing marriage. This year, on their wedding anniversary, Juliet discovered a heart-wrenching truth: Myles checked into a hotel with another woman. Disillusioned, she decided to leave him once and for good.

items.title: Echoes of a Tender Heart
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After Sandra Glock graduated from high school, her grandfather reached out to her mother, Kelly Youth, who had remarried. Kelly then brought Sandra to live with the Ruths in Kagos. Over time, Sandra grew increasingly heartbroken by her mother's repeated disappointments.   However, James Lande, a senior who fell in love with Sandra at first sight, always stood by her side. He protected, cherished, and unconditionally trusted her. In the end, his unwavering care helped Sandra find true love.

items.title: Love Through the Veil of Time
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Caroline marries into the household of Richard Sterling, the Military Governor, to save her father. She faces challenges from two scheming concubines and external threats, yet handles them with grace. As her bond with Richard deepens, they join forces to weather all storms together, committed to a lifetime of shared trials and love.

items.title: Love's Redemption
items.author: daogu
items.abstract: Love's Redemption

items.title: My Sweet Obsession
items.author: zhengdangshi
items.abstract: Rue Sean wakes up in another world as a servant in a noble household. Quiet and cautious, she wants only her freedom. But Hank Shawn, a powerful court official, becomes obsessed with her. She longs to escape. He intends to keep her by his side forever.

items.title: On the Bumpy Road to Love
items.author: zhongwen
items.abstract: To save her family, Tiana Cruz was forced to lie to her boyfriend Bryce Nash, who therefore believed she was a gold digger and left him for a rich man. What she didn't know was Bryce was the only heir to the Nash family, the richest in town. What he didn't know was the cure for his unmentionable disease was her... Fate was cruel, but as it turned out, she was his cure, his meant-to-be, and his one and only.

items.title: Second Time, Unexpected Love
items.author: shengcangduanju
items.abstract: Heartbroken in her past life for forcing a marriage with Charles, reborn Emily is determined to change her fate by seeking a swift divorce. But as she distances herself, Charles's curiosity grows, revealing his long-hidden affection. Emily soon discovers the love she once forced may have always been mutual.

items.title: Roommate Crush Gone Wild
items.author: xixuanwenhua
items.abstract: Breaking up with her toxic ex, sophomore Sophie moves in with senior Alex. Mistaking him for a model and struggling with skin hunger syndrome, she finds only Alex can ease her symptoms. Their quirky cohabitation sparks hilarious misunderstandings and unexpected chemistry, turning heartbreak into a laugh-filled, healing romance.

items.title: Fatal Attraction
items.author: shanghaijingtangwenhua
items.abstract: Jane Quinn survives the Quinn Family massacre with a new identity to hunt the killer and meets Alex Grant, whose kindness slowly melts her guarded heart. Jane finds clues tying Alex to the tragedy and chooses between doubt and love, while truth lets love and revenge clash to rewrite all the hidden rules of this dangerous game.

items.title: Our Timeless Promise
items.author: doujiaduanju
items.abstract: On the day Emily Sinclair is forced to marry a nouveau riche, she learns she is already married to Richard Knight. Betrayed by her family, she is saved by Richard Knight. She asks for a divorce, but he refuses after ten years of pursuit, and Emily Sinclair finds she may never escape this marriage.

items.title: From Being Dumped to Romance with a Billionaire
items.author: jingyue
items.abstract: After being rejected due to her hideous appearance, Kiki Shinn can't afford surgery and is forced to marry the handsome Tyson Fuller. Tyson hides the fact that he is a CEO, claiming to be just the CEO's assistant. After her surgery, Kiki discovers that her ugliness is caused by years of poisoning by her family. Her other identity is Andie, a top fashion designer. She proves her identity and teaches her half-sister, Jasmine Shinn, who steals her fiancé, a lesson. Kiki also finds out that her design in the application to Fuller Group is stolen by Tyson's admirer, Shelley Sue, and that's why she isn't hired initially. In the end, Kiki discovers she is pregnant, resigns from her job, and has a grand wedding with Tyson.

items.title: Loving Me Secretly
items.author: gediao
items.abstract: On her wedding eve, Emily Grant leaves her fiancé and impulsively marries Henry Lawson. He seems gentle but has secretly obsessed over her for ten years, watching and helping her in secret. Unaware of his dark, possessive side, Emily enters a passionate yet dangerous marriage with a powerful CEO.

items.title: Second Chance of Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Sherry Jenkins pursued Chadwick Langley for three years. After reuniting, she tries to distance herself from him, but his relentless pursuit keeps her close. Despite misunderstandings, they eventually reunite, realizing they had secretly had feelings for each other all along, only to be separated by a series of coincidences.

items.title: Overruled by Love
items.author: chengduchaowokan
items.abstract: Lisa, a renowned divorce attorney, has lost all faith in men and marriage. Determined to stay single, she keeps her heart locked away. But on her birthday, she meets Eric, a musician six years younger. With his warmth and sincerity, he awakens feelings she hasn't had in years, and her carefully ordered life begins to unravel.

items.title: The Escape Plan
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Lilah Bryan and her bestie Chaya Yoder are transmigrated into a novel as villainesses. No escape plan? No money? No problem! She decides to milk the system! But why does the supposedly celibate man look at her with such passion in his eyes? One kiss and one night later, she's pregnant. So much for celibacy!

items.title: Against All Odds
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Everyone thinks Alexander Reed is ruthless in love, but no one knows he spent fifteen lonely years fighting to return to Claire Evans. His devotion isn't about taking what isn't his—it's about never giving up, no matter how dark the world gets.

items.title: All a Yandere Needs is Love
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Sarah Summers, a fan of short dramas, finds herself transported into a short drama as a disposable character. The original character is used and causes Carlos's downfall, leading to their mutual destruction. Now, Sarah just wants to distance herself from Carlos but keeps getting caught up in the plot with him.

items.title: Lost in Lust
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: To find out the truth about her father's imprisonment, Kara Jean risked herself to get into a game. Zack Lewis, a rich, handsome man surrounded by beautiful women, was only interested in her. She used and pleased him while he dominated and teased her. Step by step, she found the truth and fell into the mire of love.

items.title: The CEO’s Surprising Odd Job
items.author: mangzhong
items.abstract: What the heck! I was supposed to get married soon, but it turns out my best friend is having an affair with my fiancé. No way am I going through with this wedding! I've worked so hard to run my restaurant, only to be mocked by this jerk for being just a restaurant owner. I just smiled and introduced my new hire: a billionaire CEO! The jerk was stunned! How could a billionaire CEO become the underling and husband of his powerless ex-girlfriend?!

items.title: The Man in My Dreams
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: At a casual gathering, Anna meets Ethan, her boyfriend's dangerously magnetic friend. Obsessed and determined to make her his, he pursues her relentlessly. Though she struggles to resist, Anna slowly realizes her heart is ensnared, until a haunting truth surfaces: Ethan is the man from her recurring dreams.

items.title: Hunted by Love
items.author: yujinwuliang
items.abstract: Desperate to fund her grandma's surgery, Xenia takes a side job as a girlfriend-for-hire. Carl, the Hunter, slowly sheds his mask, and their staged romance becomes dangerously real. But when a shattering truth tears them apart, Xenia disappears. Eight years later, Carl finds her again...

items.title: My Cold Sad Hubby
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: At 18, Cheryl Schultz confessed her love to Wilson Jarvis. After time-traveling to 6 years later, she found herself a drama queen tormenting her husband and child, fixated on Ian. Her husband, long in love, lost hope. Despite efforts, Cheryl struggled to regain her family’s trust and love.

items.title: Velvet Chains
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Zoey's reckless night leads her into bed with a prestigious tycoon. The ruthless, cold Mr. Moore becomes obsessed with her after their encounter, forcing her to wed him. A legal contract binds their vastly different destinies—one from humble beginnings, the other wielding immense wealth—as sparks of love ignite between them.

items.title: Falling for My Roommate
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: Ava Harper moves into a new apartment, sparking quirky misunderstandings with her genius male roommate. Though still a student, Ava's sharp mind helps her friends' startup land a $5 million investment. As the clever girl and computer whiz navigate life, their clashes ignite unexpected chemistry and heartwarming moments.

items.title: Love at First Rescue
items.author: fanqie
items.abstract: After being rescued from a house fire by Captain Nick Shaw, vibrant influencer Anna Smith is instantly smitten. She launches a daring plan to win his heart, embarking on a heartfelt and humorous journey of love, courage, and self-discovery as she pursues the man of her dreams.

items.title: My Contract Lover
items.author: zhongwen
items.abstract: Orphan Chloe Stone grew up in her uncle’s family. To pay off her uncle’s gambling debt owed to the Lyon Family’s heir Timothy Lyon, she signed an indenture to become Timothy’s contract lover. Timothy’s grandmother, however, likes Chloe very much instead of her grandson’s real girlfriend Elena Jones. Having become Elena’s rival, Chloe got involved in a plot where Elena and the Hunt Family’s heir Yuri Hunt conspired to take over the Lyon’s properties.

lists.special_desc: Gemma Sully was set up by her stepsister for a one-night stand with a stranger. Even her fiancé called off their engagement. Desperate to help her critically ill mother, Gemma begged her father, who cruelly suggested she spend a night with an old man. Enraged, she impulsively married a stranger who promised to cover her mother's medical expenses. Initially, she believed she married an ordinary man with good looks, but he turned out to be a powerful figure from a prestigious family.
lists.share_text: What begins as a contract ends up in love.

lists.special_desc: Zora Laurent unexpectedly arrived in a brand-new interstellar world and activated her exclusive system. With the system's help and her own wisdom, she defused provocations, stabilized the situation, discovered rare energy resources, and gradually took control of the kingdom. Awakening powerful mental abilities, she became the heir to the crown. Facing the vast interstellar opportunities, she resolved to lead the empire to explore the cosmos and create a new legend.
lists.share_text: Against her sister's plots and ex-husbands' interference, Zora prevailed.
lists.book_sub_title: Accidental Queen of the Beast Realm

lists.special_desc: When poor student Lincoln Cross is hit by campus queen Audrey Sterling, he suddenly gains powerful X-ray vision. His astonishing talent leaves gang heiress Vera Blackwood, stunning sisters Blair Leighton & Amber Collins, and the elegant Audrey Sterling utterly captivated. After all—who wouldn’t want a walking god of wealth? Adapted from a hit web novel.
lists.share_text: Crash into X-Ray Vision! Heiresses Bow Down!
lists.book_sub_title: Accidentally Revealed as Campus God of Wealth

lists.special_desc: For five years, Nora Dean has danced—all for one promise: to reach the highest honor a dancer can achieve. Only then would she earn the right, in her mother-in-law's eyes, to call herself Adrian Foster's wife. She is almost there. But somewhere between the years of silence and sacrifice, something else has faded. The man who once looked at her like she was the only person in the room now looks past her. The love she fought so hard to prove herself worthy of—Nora is no longer sure it's still there...
lists.share_text: All her steps led to him. Now she's dancing alone.
lists.book_sub_title: Dancing Toward a Love That's Gone

lists.special_desc: When broke student Lincoln Cross is hit by campus queen Audrey Sterling, he suddenly gains powerful X-ray vision. His astonishing talent leaves gang heiress Vera Blackwood, stunning sisters Blair Leighton and Amber Collins, and Audrey utterly captivated. After all, who wouldn’t want a walking god of wealth?
lists.share_text: Crash into X-Ray Vision! Heiresses Bow Down!
lists.book_sub_title: Accidentally Revealed as Campus God of Wealth

lists.special_desc: Evelyn, an ordinary high school student, is publicly humiliated after her crush on a popular hockey player is exposed. Devastated, she musters up the courage to send him nudes anonymously in hopes of catching his eye. But she accidentally sends the pics to Colton instead, the captain of the hockey team who always teases her. What will happen between them?
lists.share_text: Evelyn accidentally sends nudes to her archenemy.

lists.special_desc:
"I hope my child stays away from disputes and lives a normal life." 
Fifteen years ago, as a top agent, I retired from the field and became a low-key barbecue stall owner. But my simple wish as a mother didn't come true. 
When my daughter was bullied at school, I was furious. How dare anyone bully her under my watch!
The harm inflicted on my daughter, I will make each of you pay for it, one by one...
lists.share_text: Your mom who works at a barbecue stall is a top agent!

lists.special_desc: A rural girl who sells pork unexpectedly meets a secretive billionaire CEO. They have a whirlwind marriage, and their feelings gradually deepen. However, when his first love appears, cracks start to form between them, and billionaire's true identity becomes a ticking time bomb for their marriage.
lists.share_text: The butcher shop girl married him, but he was actually a hidden billionaire?!

lists.special_desc: Kelly was sent to the creditor Hector by her dad to offset debt. This seemingly well-designed trap was nothing more than a convenient opportunity in Hector's eyes. He calmly manipulated Kelly's father's weakness, yet in front of the pure and righteous Kelly, he played the role of an innocent victim. This two-faced man took every step carefully, setting traps gently, and ultimately firmly trapped the girl he had long loved in his life.
lists.share_text: Miss Prey, you're mine.

lists.special_desc: On the eve of her engagement, the female lead escapes her terrifying family and unexpectedly becomes pregnant with the child of a billionaire male lead. The grand hotel where she works is also acquired by him as he pursues her relentlessly. Though she only wants to work hard and prove her own worth, the man’s persistence wears her down. In the end, she not only achieves success at the hotel through her own efforts but is also pampered beyond measure by the man.
lists.share_text: The girl from the small town reaps success and love.

lists.special_desc: She was sold into a marriage with a disabled man. But when she tries to help him walk again, she makes a shocking discovery: her "broken" husband is actually Cloud City's secret billionaire. And his paralysis? It's all in his head.
lists.share_text: My disabled husband? Yeah, he owns everything.
lists.book_sub_title: Born of Mountains Destined for Miracles

lists.special_desc: Heather found her mate James was cheating with his uncle's fiancee. She was so hurt that she went into his uncle Antonio’s room to seduce him, and kissed him... However, The cold man seems had feelings for her so that he couldn't control himself and kissed her hardly...
lists.share_text: She was so hurt that she went into his uncle Antonio’s room to seduce him, and kissed him... However, The cold man seems had feelings for her so that he couldn't control himself and kissed her hardly.

lists.special_desc: The rural girl Nora was forced by her aunt to get married and escape. She accidentally had a one-night stand with the rich Graham. Six years later, she brought her son who looked very similar to Graham into the city and was saved by him, who was being urged to get married. Graham asked Nora to pretend to be his wife. With their son's help, the two recognized each other as the one-night stand mate of that night six years ago. After joining hands to smash the plot of the villains, Nora used compensation to start a pig farm, and the family of three finally reunited...
lists.share_text: Six years later, the CEO's kid is back with his Mommy!

lists.book_title: Not His Blood, But His Heart
lists.special_desc: Framed by her boyfriend and sent to prison, Annette Switt is offered a way out: save a tycoon's life with her blood. She seizes the chance, only to return home and discover his betrayal. Heartbroken, she marries the powerful Alexander Fletcher in a swift, convenient arrangement. But when revenge turns to real connection, they join forces to take down those who wronged her—and find an unexpected family along the way.
lists.share_text: She married for revenge. He married for convenience.
lists.book_sub_title: Out of Jail Into His Arms

lists.special_desc: Under threat, she had to assume someone else's identity to marry into a wealthy family. Unexpectedly, she ends up entangling with her fiancé's brother – a ruthless man who strikes fear into everyone. Due to her fake identity and the threats she faces, she doesn't dare to break things off with him easily. So, she decides to play along with him. When the family that once hunted her entire family proposes a marriage alliance with him, their relationship hits a deadlock... How will their budding romance unfold?
lists.share_text: After seducing the wrong person, she tried to run away, but was pulled into his arms by the ruthless CEO...

lists.special_desc: Audrey's biggest regret? A one-night stand with Floyd, her secret love for eight years. Despite his arranged marriage and his family's troubles, he kept rescuing her. She thought she was just a fling, but he was already head over heels for her...
lists.share_text: From a one-night stand to a lifelong obsession...

lists.special_desc: After being dumped by her ex, Nola unexpectedly finds herself in the arms of Ryan Laren—her ex’s future father-in-law, a man of immense wealth and power. Learning of her complicated bond with his daughter, Ryan tries to stay away. But Nola keeps breaking his rules, drawing him deeper into a dangerous attraction.
lists.share_text: I… I slept with my ex’s father-in-law?!

lists.special_desc: After a decade in prison taking his father’s fall, Desmond Kensington comes home to save his mother—only to be tormented relentlessly by his cruel stepmother Veronica and her illegitimate son Roland. Biding his time in silence, he leverages sharp wit and bold resolve to seize the security division, Metropolis Club and Pinnacle Capital, tightening his grip on the core of the Kensington Group. Hiding his fearsome alias Lord Nonus, he allies with Elena to uncover the truth behind his elder brother’s death, lay bare Veronica’s twisted plots, and settle every past score. From a disgraced prison outcast to a dominant tycoon, he strikes with ruthless force to uproot decay, make all wrongdoers pay, and climb to the pinnacle of power to rule the business world.
lists.share_text: 10 Years Jailed! Lord Nonus Ends Veronica!
lists.book_sub_title: Out of Jail Into the Throne

lists.special_desc: Ten months after Nancy Miller’s fateful encounter with Blake Hart, the CEO of Hart Corp, a devastating accident takes her mother’s life. Desperate to secure her newborn daughter’s future, Nancy leaves her at Blake’s doorstep. Later, with a recommendation from her mentor, Nancy joins Hart Corp. As Blake raises their daughter, he embarks on a relentless search across the city for Nancy, eagerly awaiting the day she will return to him and walk down the aisle in the grand wedding he’s been planning all along.
lists.share_text: A baby left at his door, a love story waiting to unfold.

lists.special_desc: Ella is deathly afraid of werewolves; now she’s pregnant with one. Forced into a contract marriage with billionaire Alpha Dominic Moon, she must hide her identity to survive.
lists.share_text: You're having the Alpha's baby but will he have you?

lists.book_title: Love in the Ashes of us
lists.special_desc: Nina and Easton have been in love for ten years. She stands by him through everything, from his days as an unknown student to becoming a billionaire. But just as Easton reaches the height of his success, Nina catches him getting too close with his business partner, Candice. With Candice stirring the pot, Nina finally gives up on him completely. One day, the three of them board the same flight. Mid-air, the plane experiences a sudden emergency. During the crash landing, Easton chooses to protect Candice—leaving Nina, who is pregnant with twins, in critical danger...
lists.share_text: You promise me forever—but forever ends the moment she appears.

lists.special_desc: Emma and Liam shared a magical night together that ended abruptly when Liam left the next morning without a explanation. Six months later, they get reunited at Emma's sister's wedding where Liam is the best man. As their unsolved feelings come rushing back, Emma decides to fake date Liam for the weekend to get her ex to leave her alone.
lists.share_text: Fake date for the weekend? What could go wrong?

lists.special_desc: Adeline Rhodes is diagnosed with stage four kidney cancer and has months to live. Her husband, Blake Rhodes, seems preoccupied with her half-sister Rebecca, whom she constantly has to donate blood to. Blake mistakes Adeline for a calculating gold-digger, and she thinks he’s never loved her. All of this changes when Blake finds out Adeline’s dying, but it might be too late for him to tell her that it was her that he loved all this time.
lists.share_text: Before I go...will you kiss me one last time?

lists.special_desc: On the night of her engagement, Charlotte discovers her fiancé William cheating with her best friend. Just as her world collapses, rising hockey star Ryan unexpectedly steps into her life and becomes the only person willing to protect her.But their connection soon pulls them into something far more dangerous than heartbreak. After Ryan is brutally injured during a suspicious game, Charlotte uncovers a web of power, money, and manipulation tied to her family fortune.
lists.share_text: He was supposed to be her revenge. Turns out, he's the target.

lists.special_desc: When a disciplined former Secret Service agent is forced to partner with a reckless global pop star after his daughter is kidnapped by her obsessive ex, their race across the Philippines ignites a volatile romance- one that forces them to choose between control, trust, and the people they love most.
lists.share_text: A disciplined agent and a reckless pop star must learn to trust each other—or lose everything. But the greatest risk? Falling in love.

lists.special_desc: In Reelshort's first unscripted series, 40 singles swipe on each other in real life in order to find true love. They are taken on a series of date challenges designed to test compatibility, connection, and long-term potential. But those who didn’t match are given a second chance at redemption: if they successfully break up any of our newfound couplings, they receive cold hard cash. Can love survive love bombing?
lists.share_text: Real chemistry, real consequences, and real people paid to wreak real havoc.

lists.special_desc: For centuries, the most powerful vampires, the Tepes family and the Velda family have remained an alliance which, if broken, could send the world into chaos like never before. The alliance is threatened by a seemingly normal human girl Sammantha Evans, a waitress at Club Dracula owned by the powerful Alarik Tepes. One fateful night on New Years Eve, the world will be changed forever…
lists.share_text: Sometimes, the world no longer needs heroes. What it needs is a monster.

lists.special_desc: Marina Sinclair is unloved by her family. Framed by her sister and thrown into jail, she's shamed by her father, cursed by her mother, and blamed by her brother. After cutting ties for good, she unexpectedly becomes the cherished obsession of Damien Yates, the untouchable "Golden Scion" of the city. Only then does she realize: Damien has always been the light in her darkest days — silently guarding, healing, and loving her. To him, she's always been exclusive.
lists.share_text: Betrayed by her family but cherished by the most powerful man. Her real story begins when she walks away.

lists.special_desc: Aria won Luca’s love in an arranged mafia marriage, but when she secretly helps her sister flee the life, she betrays him. With their families at war and a baby on the way, Aria must decide whether love can survive when loyalty is paid for in blood.
lists.share_text: Mafia love tested by betrayal and blood.

lists.book_title: Tell Me Not to Love You
lists.special_desc: Brie is the daughter of a servant who works for Teddy’s family. She grew up living in the household with her mother and developed mutual feelings for the young master, Teddy. Once they came of age, Teddy began pursuing Brie passionately, but Brie feels insecure because of her status as a servant’s daughter. Teddy struggles to convince her to be with him. Brie keeps trying to pull away, but through all their back-and-forth, she eventually admits how she truly feels.
lists.share_text: I'm my Master's housemaid. He's in love with me.

lists.special_desc: Best friends Summer and Faye are unexpectedly thrust into the world of a novel, assuming the roles of the devoted wife to the shrewd Adrian Watson and the stand-in lover for the possessive Julian Watson. While they seem ensnared in unrequited love, they secretly revel in the opulent lifestyle of the elite. But, the return of Mia Piper, another key heroine, shatters their tranquil existence. To escape the looming tragic fate, they devise a daring plan to fake their own deaths. Unbeknownst to them, their "deaths" push Adrian and Julian to the brink of despair. Then, a chance encounter brings the four back together again...
lists.share_text: Now, can they outsmart the story itself?

lists.special_desc: Sara throws herself at Edward and becomes the city's biggest joke. Everyone thinks she is hopelessly in love until the truth comes out. Edward is just a stand-in for someone else, and she never loves him at all. But when Sara tries to walk away, the man, once incapable of love, snaps. Now, he'll do anything to keep her.
lists.share_text: Love, betrayal, obsession... Who is really in control?

lists.special_desc: Stella Langford's college shuts down. She has to transfer to another college, but ends up living with Nathaniel Hawthorne, CEO of Hawthorne Group. They are forced into a contract marriage. Bullied by socialite Vicky Swing, Stella fights back with her sharp wits and shooting skills. But when her true identity and a buried past begin to surface, Nathaniel realizes the girl he married on paper is the one he's been destined to protect all along.
lists.share_text: She is his contract wife. He never expected she’d be his destiny.

lists.special_desc: She faked a disability and spent her inheritance to save him. His first words after recovery? A confession of love—for another woman. Now she’s marrying his rival.
lists.share_text: This time, she’s done being silent.

lists.special_desc: Emily, a janitor with minimum wage and a sick daughter to care for, flash marries her ex-boyfriend Mark Cardmon twenty years after he disappeared and got his face reconfigured due to a car accident. However, neither Emily nor Mark suspected each other of being the person they knew before while falling with each other in love for the second time. Through helping Emily's daughter Selene with her surgery and fending Emily at work from toxic colleagues, Mark gradually realizes that Emily is his boyfriend and Selene is his daughter. Will they finally be able to get married now they are well into their 40s?
lists.share_text: Will this decades-spanning romance overcome the obstacles and reach a happy ending?

lists.special_desc: Trapped on a snowbound train, a drugged Ophelia James shares a wild night with a stranger and gets pregnant. Ten months later, she fakes a marriage with Simon Rhodes, unaware that his brother, Harrison, the feared head of the Rhodes family, is the man from that night. Falsely diagnosed as sterile, Harrison hides his desire, playing the supportive brother-in-law while secretly protecting her. Born in the first snow, their bond becomes a destiny he will defy anything to keep. Once cold and isolated, Ophelia melts his icy heart and becomes his sole obsession.
lists.share_text: One snowy night sealed our destiny.
lists.book_sub_title: Love Fell with the First Snow

lists.book_title: Love's Second Chance at His Office
lists.special_desc: During his student years, he mistakenly believed his girlfriend was involved in escorting for money. After building his business empire, he bound her to his side as his executive assistant through a contract. Ultimately, amidst ongoing tumult and suspicion, they resolved their misunderstandings and moved towards each other in mutual love.
lists.share_text: Can our love, tainted by misunderstandings, ever return to what it once was?
lists.book_sub_title: Secret of the Assistant: Our Ill-Timed Love

lists.special_desc: Caroline Winsor, once a pawn in her mother's quest for luxury, is betrothed to the controlling tycoon Dominic. On the day of their grand wedding, she decides to escape, only to find herself in the thrilling world of underground racing, ruled by the enigmatic Wyatt. Unbeknownst to all, this icy racer harbors a secret identity. What could happen between a fallen heiress and a street racer?
lists.share_text: Runaway bride meets dangerous street racer!

lists.special_desc: Disguising herself as ugly, Clara marries elite heir Jace to honor her mother's wish. She thinks he loves her true self, but she's just his pawn to defy his family and shield his first love. After three years of abuse, she divorces him, unveils her beauty, and shocks everyone. Jace begs for a second chance, but Clara is done. Is his belated love too late?
lists.share_text: He used her as a pawn. Is his belated love too late?

lists.special_desc: When Sophia sets out to find her missing twin sister, Tina, the trail leads her to The Red Veil, an elite vampire nightclub ruled by the ruthless Von Drák family. As she digs deeper into its dark, seductive world, Sophia discovers a chilling prophecy, a forbidden romance, and a supernatural war that could consume them all.
lists.share_text: In a world ruled by vampires, Sophia’s quest for her missing sister uncovers forbidden romance and a prophecy powerful enough to ignite an eternal war between darkness and light.

data.name: Cinta yang Menyimpang
data.summary: Ayu Santoso, putri pemilik perusahaan pelayaran, dikhianati oleh tunangannya tepat di hari pernikahan. Dalam keputusasaan, ia memutuskan menikah dengan Andi Permana. Menghadapi tuduhan plagiat dan tekanan publik, Ayu berani membuktikan kebenaran dirinya. Melalui ujian keluarga, karier, dan pencarian jati diri, Ayu bangkit menghadapi tantangan, meraih kemandirian dan kedewasaan.

data.name: [Dubbing] Balas Dendam Sang Jenius
data.summary: Ega, kunci sukses Nirpuncak, dikhianati Susan yang mencuri kredit dan mencari promosi. Ega mengungkap penipuannya dan memicu kejatuhannya. Mengungkap Vino sebagai otak sebenarnya, Ega kembali berkuasa dan memimpin Nirpuncak.

data.name: Jodoh Dari Penjara
data.summary: Saat mendapat pesanan proyek dari penjara, Nara Sumin bertemu dengan seorang tahanan yang sangat tampan. Setengah tahun kemudian, setelah mengetahui tunangannya selingkuh, takdir membawa Nara bertemu kembali dengan tahanan tampan itu dan memutuskan untuk nikah kilat. Apakah kehidupan pernikahan mereka akan berjalan lancar?

data.name: [Dijuluki]Burung Migran Tak Lagi Terbang ke Selatan
data.summary: Lu Yuan, seorang CEO kaya raya, sangat mencintai istrinya Zhou Mingyue dan bahkan membantu mendanai perusahaannya. Namun, Zhou Mingyue bersama keluarganya dan teman masa kecilnya, Song Yang, terus memanfaatkan Lu Yuan hingga menjebaknya ke penjara.Setelah bebas, Lu Yuan akhirnya menyadari kebenaran dan kehilangan seluruh perasaannya. Ketika Zhou Mingyue bahkan membawa Song Yang dan ayahnya tinggal bersama, Lu Yuan memulai balas dendamnya—mengambil kembali semua yang pernah ia berikan, beserta bunganya.

data.name: Rahasia Kelahiran
data.summary: Kisah tentang Yuni Sukma yang ingin mencari keberadaan orang tua kandungnya. Setelah melewati berbagai rintangan, akhirnya terkuaklah kebenaran masa lalu.

data.name: Rahasia Janji yang Terlupakan
data.summary: Clara Salih hamil dengan pria yang gak dia kenal, dan akhirnya bertemu dengannya kembali. Melewati proses lama, akhirnya kembali bersama, tapi kisahnya gak berakhir di situ, ternyata masih ada rahasia di balik itu.

data.name: [Dubbing]Pengkhianatan Calon Suamiku
data.summary: Seraphina Vitali dikhianati oleh calon suaminya, Nico Bellini, di saat hampir menikah. Seraphina yang telah membantu Nico dari nol, merasa tidak terima dan melancarkan rencana pembalasan yang akan membuat Nico menyesal.

data.name: Takhta dan Perang Gerbang Iblis
data.summary: Jason terlibat dalam perselisihan dengan Jordan dalam mendapatkan posisi Putra Mahkota. Bersama istrinya, Jenny, mereka menghadapi krisis kudeta, berbagai perebutan kekuasaan yang saling terkait dengan emosi dan ambisi. Kebenaran di balik perang Gerbang Iblis terkuak, meski harus melibatkan banyak orang dan mengarah pada kenaikan takhta Jason.

data.name: [Dubbing] Ibu dari Dunia Lain Balaskan Dendamku
data.summary: Laras dikhianati empat ayahnya yang merupakan Raja Alfa dan bersaing dengan Gita. Santi, ibunya dari dunia lain, kembali untuk balas dendam. Kemudian, mereka pergi ke dunia modern untuk hidup bersama.

data.name: [Dijuluki]Transaksi dengan Leluhur
data.summary: Su Chen, seorang magang toko antik, dipukuli dan diceraikan paksa oleh istrinya. Namun, darahnya mengenai gelang warisan yang membawanya bertemu sang leluhur hingga dia mendapatkan kekuatan Mata Dewa.

data.name: [Dijuluki]Bangkitnya Kaum Rendahan
data.summary: Noah Karlo demi merawat ibunya yang lumpuh, dia tinggal di desa selama 10 tahun. Dia mengasah ilmu tinju Keluarga Karlo, tetapi selalu menyembunyikan keahliannya. Setelah ibunya meninggal, dia melanggar janji "tidak menyakiti orang" demi melindungi adiknya. Demi mencari nafkah, dia pergi ke kota dan bekerja sebagai pelayan bar. Berkat kemampuan bela dirinya yang luar biasa, dia berkali-kali mengatasi krisis, mendapatkan teman sejati dan kisah cinta. Namun, juga terlibat dalam konflik para tokoh berkuasa. Meski dijebak dan diremehkan oleh kalangan elite, dia tetap berpegang teguh pada prinsipnya. Terus berjuang dengan prinsip "kebangkitkan kaum rendahan".

data.name: Cinta di Balik Identitas Rahasia
data.summary: erangan hacker “Moonshadow” ke perusahaan Jason memicu konflik keluarga kaya, cinta, dan geng. Niki terseret jadi pemimpin Youming Bang. Identitas Moonshadow terungkap, terjadi penculikan, Jason menyelamatkan keluarga. Akhirnya mereka bersatu, menikah, punya anak, dan terus menghadapi tantangan baru.

data.name: [Dijuluki]Penguasa Dunia Yang Mulia Raja Dewa
data.summary: Perebutan sengit terjadi antara keluarga Alvin dan Zahra demi mendapatkan kontrak besar. Identitas asli Alvin akhirnya terungkap, dia adalah Yang Mulia Raja Dewa. Pada upacara penobatannya, seluruh keluarga bangsawan datang untuk menyatakan kesetiaan mereka. Zahra nyatakan cintanya dan bertekad untuk selalu di sisinya.

data.name: [Dijuluki]Menikahi Sahabat Kakak
data.summary: Danu Baskara, penerus Kaisar Manusia, demi memenuhi amanah pendahulunya mencari keluarga yang hilang, ia pulang negeri. Baru pulang, dia tanpa sengaja menghabiskan satu malam dengan Evi Wijaya, yang ternyata adalah sahabat kakaknya. Dari situ, hubungan mereka terungkap dan takdir baru pun dimulai.

data.name: [Dubbing] Kehidupan Kedua: Balas Dendam di Dunia Mistis
data.summary: Fandi Moran mati disiksa rentenir dan dikhianati sahabat dan pacarnya, dia mendapat kehidupan kedua, dan berencana membalas dendan, sekalian memperkuat dirinya. Apakah rencananya akan berjalan lancar di dunia mistis ini?

data.name: Dipaksa Kawin Dengan Komandan Terhebat
data.summary: Nadira Surya memulai kuliah di Universitas Raya, hadapi konflik keluarga dan Ospek, kemampuannya menonjol namun diremehkan oleh Tim Langit Pangeran. Bersama timnya, dia jadi juara. Pangeran Kesembilan Gilbran terus membantunya dan mendapati dirinya jatuh hati pada Nadira.

data.name: Dia Kira Aku Miskin, Kukira Dia Anak Baik
data.summary: Jacob, si genius farmasi pewaris Grup Damai, menyamar jadi mahasiswa miskin demi mengejar Yuna, putri Grup Somar. Saat masa lalu kelam kematian ibu Yuna terungkap akibat pengkhianatan Grup Dorga, Jacob diam-diam meracik penawar racun dan membongkar identitas aslinya untuk melindungi Yuna sampai tuntas.

data.name: [Dubbing] Siapa Ratu Asli?
data.summary: Ryder Kane, seorang juara balapan yang terobsesi dengan Sang Ratu, akhirnya mengabaikan pacarnya yang baik, Alexis Davenport. Ternyata Alexis bukan orang biasa yang dikenal Ryder. Siapa dia sebenarnya?

data.name: [Dijuluki]Masuk Novel! Aku Dapat Suami Kaya dan Tampan
data.summary: Dua gadis masuk ke dalam novel dan terjerat di antara perselisihan mengenai masalah pewaris asli dan palsu, permusuhan keluarga, skandal perselingkuhan, dan perebutan kekuasaan. Berbagai karakter secara bergantian mengungkap perbuatan jahat Aditya Rahardjo, diselingi dengan humor melodramatis yang renyah dan manis.

data.name: [Dubbing] Gelang Kebenaran
data.summary: Dalam keluarga yang tidak harmonis, Evi mengandalkan 'gelang kebenaran' untuk mengawasi anak perempuannya, memilih Mia yang tampak jujur daripada Lili. Ketika nasib tragis menimpa Lili, alat itu terbukti tidak dapat diandalkan, dan kesedihan, tuduhan, serta rasa bersalah menghancurkan seluruh keluarga.

data.name: [Dijuluki]Kaisar Bela Diri Abadi
data.summary: Adik tirinya berniat menyingkirkan dia demi hak waris. Siapa sangka, kemampuan bertarungnya ternyata tidak terkalahkan. Dia rupanya adalah Kaisar Bela Diri, sosok penguasa tertinggi di atas puluhan ribu orang

data.name: Permaisuri Gila yang Cantik
data.summary: Ayunda membuka fakta kejam tentang ibunya dan membuktikan dirinya putri Pangeran Prabu. Ayu dan ibunya hadapi banyak rintangan dan ungkap pemberontakan ayah kandungnya, namun akhirnya dihormati di bawah perlindungan Kaisar.

data.name: Cinta Beracun
data.summary: Setelah bercerai dan menghadapi konflik keluarga serta perebutan kekuasaan, Vina mengungkap perselingkuhan dan konspirasi Reza. Ia kembali sebagai ketua Grup Indura, menata perusahaan, memecat Reza, dan menggagalkan serangan sistem. Akhirnya, Vina merebut hak asuh anak dan kendali perusahaa

data.name: Secercah Cahaya di Tengah Kegelapan
data.summary: Alya dipenjara atas tuduhan runtuhnya jembatan. Dia bekerja jadi barista di kehidupan baru. Mantan suaminya, Satria, mengungkap masa lalu bersama tunangannya, Ines. Namun, kebenran terungkap dan Ines tertangkap. Alya bertemu teman lamanya, Juna, menyembuhkan diri di luar negeri dan membangun hidup baru.

data.name: [Dijuluki]Penyamaran Ratu Dunia Bisnis
data.summary: Uti Henia bertemu dengan tetangga lamanya, Sari Florina ketika hendak melakukan wawancara sebagai petugas kebersihan di Grup Taruna. Tanpa disengaja, dia dianggap sebagai Nyonya Besar Grup Taruna oleh karyawan. Sedangkan Sari, Nyonya Besar Keluarga Taruna sungguhan malah dianggap sebagai petugas kebersihan. Bagaimana kelanjutan cerita mereka?

data.name: [Dubbing] Dikira Keluarga Biasa
data.summary: Serena yang dikira berasal dari keluarga biasa, dipaksa menunda kelahirannya padahal sudah pembukaan lengkap, diabaikan dan dibiarkan sekarat karena mengandung anak perempuan. Apakah Serena bisa selamat?

data.name: [Dijuluki]Menikah Kilat Dengan CEO Cantik
data.summary: Erik Salim turun gunung untuk mencari bagian akhir Kitab Sembilan Naga dan menepati janji perjodohannya, tapi malah berujung dipermalukan Keluarga Kusuma. Tiba-tiba, Alina Tanto muncul sebagai tunangan asli Erik. Erik pun bangkit menumpas musuhnya sebelum takdir dengan kejam merenggut Alina darinya.

data.name: [Dijuluki]Misi Keadilan
data.summary:
Ling Feng, putra raja judi, memutuskan berhenti berjudi setelah keluarganya hancur karena perjudian. Namun ia diserang musuh dan koma.

Untuk biaya pengobatan, adik iparnya kalah besar di kasino, dan istrinya Su Ruoxue terjebak dalam permainan curang hingga hampir kehilangan segalanya.

Saat semuanya di ambang kehancuran, Ling Feng akhirnya sadar dan membantu membalikkan keadaan.

data.name: Sampai Jumpa Kehidupan Lama
data.summary: Lenny Sena mendekam 10 tahun di penjara akibat suaminya, Rendi Guma. Ternyata semua ini bukan salah Lenny, dan juga tidak mau mengulangi kesalahan lagi. Dia pun memulai hidup barunya, meski tetap ada rintangan.

data.name: Aku Seorang Anak Terkutuk
data.summary: Evelyn terlahir sebagai anak terkutuk dan diculik sejak kecil, setelah keluarganya menemukannya kembali, adik tirinya menjebaknya sampai membuat Evelyn disalahpahami keluarganya sendiri. Evelyn yang awalnya jadi pewaris, harus melihat psosisinya dicabut oleh ayahnya.

data.name: [Dijuluki]Jenderal yang Terkhianati
data.summary: Setelah Hendy Saka diselamatkan oleh Rani Sumadi, Hendy malah mengkhianati Rani. Dari pengkhianatan itu, muncullah banyak masalah dan peperangan, bagaimana nasib Hendy dan Rani dalam menghadapinya?

data.name: [Dijuluki]Menyapu Dunia dengan Satu Langkah
data.summary: Hery tiba-tiba terbangun di dunia kultivasi penuh kekuatan dan para genius. Meski menganggap dirinya hanya orang biasa, dia ternyata memiliki kekuatan tak terkalahkan. Menghadapi berbagai tokoh kuat seperti reinkarnator dan anak takdir, dia menekan semuanya dan menyapu dunia tanpa tanding.

data.name: Akulah Pemandu Starial
data.summary: Seorang wanita di kehidupan nyata masuk ke dalam novel dan menjadi seorang Pemandu di Planet Starial yang bernama Wanda Sumala. Wanda merupakan wanita keji yang suka melakukan kekerasan pada penjaga yang ingin mendapatkan ketenangan darinya. Setelah wanita itu masuk ke pemilik tubuh asli Wanda, dia berusaha menebus kesalahan yang pemilik tubuh asli lakukan.

data.name: [Dijuluki]Hidup Lagi Demi Istriku
data.summary: Rafi yang difitnah oleh keluarga pacarnya yang kaya raya dicelakai ibu si pacar, mengakibatkan mereka berdua mengalami musibah. Terbangun di kehidupan yang baru lagi 15 tahun kemudian, Rafi berusaha memperbaiki segalanya, memperjuangkan kehidupan bahagia mereka.

data.name: Dendam Penjinak Monster Terkuat
data.summary: Gavin Lukman, bocah yang gak punya bakat penjinak monster dan menjadi anak buangan Keluarga Lukman. Ternyata insiden itu membangkitkan Sistem Pemasok Hewan Roh. Apakah Gavin bisa berhasil menyelesaikan semua dendam masa lalu?

data.name: Sampai Jumpa, Masa Lalu-ku
